case_title: 2900 GEARY BOULEVARD VENTURE VS. WAIDEN MAR, AND EACH OF THEM et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 30

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 2900 GEARY BOULEVARD VENTURE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WAIDEN MAR, AND EACH OF THEM INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS PET SOURCE FRANCES MAR, ALSO KNOWN AS FRANCES CHIU, AND EACH OF THEM INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS PET SOURCE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2900 GEARY BOULEVARD, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94118. $87,572.43 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $87,572.43, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 2900 GEARY BOULEVARD VENTURE AS TO DEFENDANT WAIDEN MAR, AND EACH OF THEM INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS PET SOURCE FRANCES MAR, ALSO KNOWN AS FRANCES CHIU, AND EACH OF THEM INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS PET SOURCE DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF 2900 GEARY BOULEVARD VENTURE AS TO DEFENDANT WAIDEN MAR, AND EACH OF THEM INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS PET SOURCE FRANCES MAR, ALSO KNOWN AS FRANCES CHIU, AND EACH OF THEM INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS PET SOURCE
